title: Youyi Feng
compiled_truth: Youyi Feng is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-07-11 to 2001-08-21), Youyi Feng sent 3 and received 69 emails, totalling 72 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (1), [Sean Bolks](people/sean-bolks) (1), [Jim Wiltfong](people/jim-wiltfong) (1), [Don Powell](people/don-powell) (1), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (1).
